copy.primary: Discover Harlin by Wesgroup — modern studio to 3-bed homes now selling in Vancouver’s River District. Enjoy waterfront living steps from trails, dining, and the town centre, with thoughtfully curated rooftop spaces above it all.
copy.headline: Now Selling in River District

carouselCards.headline: Make Yourself at Home at Harlin

carouselCards.headline: Make Yourself at Home at Harlin

descriptions: Harlin is the newest addition to Vancouver River District.
A neighbourhood surrounded by riverside trails, cozy coffee spots, and local shops.
Harlin is now selling at River District. Where life flows naturally.
25 mins to downtown Vancouver, YVR 20 minutes, Richmond or Burnaby only 10 minutes.
Harlin is the newest addition to Vancouver River District.
A neighbourhood surrounded by riverside trails, cozy coffee spots, and local shops.
Harlin is now selling at River District. Where life flows naturally.
25 mins to downtown Vancouver, YVR 20 minutes, Richmond or Burnaby only 10 minutes.
Modern studio to 3-bed homes in River District with thoughtfully curated rooftop spaces.

headlines: Make Yourself at Home at Harlin
